title: OmniProject GTD energy-level vocabulary entry
description: One canonical GTD energy/effort level (David Allen's "how much have I got in the tank" axis, orthogonal to an hour estimate), authored as a single JSON array (assets/energy-vocabulary.json), validated element-by-element against this schema and embedded by gen-energy-vocabulary. Every level binds to an internal ordinal `level` — the invariant the ordering + filtering key off.

labels.description: Optional per-locale translations of the label (BCP-47 key → text, e.g. { "de": "Niedrig", "en-GB": "Low" }). A viewer sees labels[theirLocale] ?? labels[lang] ?? label, so the same screen renders in each user's language.

level.description: The internal ordinal LEVEL this energy token binds to (1 = lowest tank … ascending) — the invariant the ordering/filtering maths key off, kept SEPARATE from `order` (display position). The three shipped levels ARE the anchors (low=1, medium=2, high=3); an adjustable level declares which ordinal band it binds to.

color.description: Swatch colour as a 6-digit hex (rendered via inline style, so a custom level can carry any colour). Absent ⇒ a neutral swatch.

methodologies.description: Methodology tags this level belongs to ('*' = neutral / all). Selecting a methodology surfaces its tagged levels, so each methodology can carry its own normal nomenclature. Absent ⇒ neutral.
